nodes.name: Maroon-fronted parrot
nodes.summary: Maroon-fronted parrot（Maroon-fronted parrot，学名 Rhynchopsitta terrisi），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This bird is considered endangered due to overgrazing and habitat destruction. The ITESM Campus Monterrey carry out environmental education programs and science research in Cumbres de Monterrey National Park and Sierra de Arteaga for the conservation of maroon-fronted parrots
